title: On Seeing The Beautiful Seat Of Lord Galloway.
content:
What dost thou in that mansion fair?
            Flit, Galloway, and find
        Some narrow, dirty, dungeon cave,
            The picture of thy mind!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "On Seeing The Beautiful Seat Of Lord Galloway."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
